message:
deps: bump smallvec 1.14.0 -> 1.15.1

Minor bump within 1.x. Additive API only (new `SmallVec::spilled`, const
fns). Existing call sites unchanged.

Verification: rch exec -- cargo check --workspace --all-targets clean.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -65,7 +65,7 @@ rayon = "1.12.0"
 serde = { version = "1.0.228", features = ["derive"] }
 serde_json = { version = "1.0.149", features = ["preserve_order"] }
 sha2 = "0.11.0"
-smallvec = "1.14.0"
+smallvec = "1.15.1"
 tempfile = "3.17.1"
 thiserror = "2.0.11"
 toml = "0.8"
